page.description: Warm white root background, Notion's signature canvas

highlightPalette.description: Notion's 6-color pastel bg + saturated text pair system

modal.use: Dialog backdrops and modal surfaces only

buttonPrimary.css: background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 8px 22px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out;

buttonSecondary.css: background: transparent; color: var(--ink); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 8px 22px; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line); border: none; cursor: pointer;

buttonTaskAction.css: border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer;

card.css: background: var(--panel); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 28px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line);

input.css: background: var(--page); color: var(--ink); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 16px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line); border: none; outline: none;

tabs.tabButton: border-radius: var(--radius-full); padding: 10px 26px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; background: transparent; color: var(--ink); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 180ms ease-out;

priorityTag.css: display: inline-block; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;

progressBar.css: height: 8px; background: var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-full); overflow: hidden; cursor: ew-resize; user-select: none;
progressBar.fill: height: 100%; background: var(--accent); border-radius: var(--radius-full); pointer-events: none;

dragHandle.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 20px; height: 24px; cursor: grab; color: var(--muted); font-size: 14px; user-select: none; border-radius: 4px; opacity: 0.3;

namedRules.notionHover: Interactive elements hover toward rgba(55,53,47,0.06) — a warm neutral gray tint. No colored hovers.
namedRules.panelTonalShift: Panel hover states shift background to var(--page). No shadow reveal on hover.
namedRules.highlightPair: Every highlight color comes as a bg+text pair. Never mix bg from one pair with text from another.
namedRules.oneAccent: The accent color appears on at most 10% of any screen. A button, a selected tab, a checked box.
namedRules.ghostBorder: Borders are 1px solid, in var(--line). Color emphasis comes from background tints, not side borders.
namedRules.weightOnly: Hierarchy is created through font weight and size alone. Never through color alone on the same size.
namedRules.flatByDefault: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (drag, modal elevation).

narrative.scene: A warm white document open on a desk in soft morning light. Content breathes. The interface fades until only the tasks remain, each one sitting in a gentle pastel bed that tells you its priority at a glance.
narrative.aesthetic: Warm minimalism borrowed from Notion. Generous whitespace, six pastel highlight colors, warm gray text, Inter typeface. Surfaces are clean and flat, with hover states that warm rather than flash. The highlight palette makes quadrants and priorities scannable without relying on borders or labels.
keyCharacteristics: Warm white page (#FFFEFC) — the signature Notion canvas
Six-color highlight system for semantic tagging and quadrants
Unified warm-gray ink (#37352F) for all primary text
Neutral gray hover tint (rgba(55,53,47,0.06)) across all interactive elements
Default 708px content width for focused reading on desktop web
Inter typeface leading a system font stack
Generous whitespace — 25-50% more than the previous design
Pastel bg + saturated text pairs for task action buttons

all.comment: Notion Calm design tokens — applied across Electron, desktop web, mobile web, and sticky window
